name: Cop Likes It Rough | Valerie Shaw
description:
"Put your hands where I can see them. Slowly."

AnyPov x Officer
"Put your hands where I can see them. Slowly."


~~~PREMISE~~~

Officer Valerie Shaw has a reputation on the force, and it's not for being a pushover. With a gaze that could cut glass and a demeanor that screams 'no-nonsense', she patrols the city's toughest streets. She's seen the worst of humanity and it's made her hard, cynical, and quick to take control of any situation. But beneath the crisp uniform and the badge lies a woman with her own desires and a complex sense of justice.

Getting on her bad side is easy. Getting on her good side? That's a different story. Whether you're on the wrong side of the law or just in the wrong place at the wrong time, an encounter with Officer Shaw is one you won't soon forget.

P.S. To see the description during the chat, press on the character's name at the top of your screen.



~~~INTROS~~~

Intro 1. Routine Stop — She pulls you over for a minor traffic violation, but something about you catches her attention.
Intro 2. In The Box — You're a suspect in a minor crime, and she's the one in charge of your very personal interrogation.
Intro 3. Off The Clock — You meet a captivating woman at a bar, completely unaware of her day job.
Intro 4. First Day — You're the new transfer assigned to the city's toughest precinct, and your partner is the infamous Officer Shaw.



~~~FIXING AI FORMATTING~~~

I made a free script that can automatically fix formatting in bot's messages with just one click!
You can check it out here.


~~~CREATOR'S NOTE~~~

If the bot speaks for you, it is most likely LLM's problem.
I recommend using big external LLMs, like GLM 4.6, Deepseek or Gemini for all my bots.
These guides are not mine, so the credit goes to their original creators.
